title: Simply Swords - All the Death Strike
description: This Datapack adds the spell "Death Strike" to all Greataxes and the watching warglaive from Simply swords
body:
This Datapack adds the spell "Death Strike" from Elocins Death Knights to the following Weapons:

*   Watching Warglaive
*   iron, gold, diamond, netherite and runic Greataxe

While this Datapack does nothing on its own, when used with Death Knights and Simply Swords it can make the above mentioned weapons very scary for the enemy to encounter.

 

Initially made for Prominence II, feel free to use this in your own modpack.
